label: Aerobic capacity
description: Sustained sub-threshold conditioning, typically >8 min, steady breathing.

label: Anaerobic capacity
description: Short, high-intensity efforts with incomplete recovery; sprint conditioning.

label: Heavy strength
description: Low reps at high load to build maximal strength.

label: Muscular endurance
description: High-rep, moderate-load work sustaining muscular output over time.

label: Gymnastics skill
description: Bodyweight skill and control (e.g., muscle-ups, handstands, pull-ups).

label: Olympic lifting
description: Snatch/clean & jerk technique and power expression.
